---
title: 'Hyperion: A 3D Visualization Platform for Optical Design of Folded Systems'
author:
- Daniel K. Nikolov
- Sifan Ye
- Sydney Dlhopolsky
- Zhen Bai
- Yuhao Zhu
- Jannick P. Rolland
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/frameless19.pdf
journ: Frameless (Demo)
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a9kBGDjsctM
pub_number: 34
---
